name: Mary Kate Butler — parents (1908, Ireland)
researcher_question: Who were the parents of Mary Catherine Butler, born 20 March 1908 in Waterford, Ireland?
notes: Irish civil registration records (IrishGenealogy.ie) are the primary evidence — FamilySearch has only the civil registration INDEXES (name + district + year, no parent/spouse names), so the agent cannot recover parentage from FamilySearch alone. The IrishGenealogy.ie captures are bundled in provided-documents/ (the FS tools can't reach that site): Mary Kate Butler's birth certificate (listing father John J. Butler and mother Kate Butler née Canty), the John Butler & Catherine Canty 1906 marriage record, and John Butler's 1881 birth record from Kilkenny. The father's identity is further complicated by a discrepancy between the civil birth registration (listing 'Mary Muldowney' as mother) and the baptism record (listing 'Mary Knight'), which the report resolves through sibling records. Non-FamilySearch sources (British Newspaper Archive obituary, Ireland Genealogy Projects gravestone) are referenced but the core parentage finding rests on the bundled Irish civil registration records.
